# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /app /var/log/supervisor /var/run/postgresql

RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir flask gunicorn

RUN bash -lc "cat > /app/api.py <<'EOF'\nfrom flask import Flask\napp = Flask(__name__)\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef hello():\n    return {'message': 'API server running'}\nEOF"

RUN bash -lc "cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'\nserver {\n    listen 80 default_server;\n    listen [::]:80 default_server;\n    server_name _;\n\n    location / {\n        return 200 'Web server running';\n        add_header Content-Type text/plain;\n    }\n}\nEOF"

RUN bash -lc "cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf <<'EOF'\n[supervisord]\nnodaemon=true\n\n[program:postgresql]\ncommand=/usr/bin/bash -c \"mkdir -p /var/run/postgresql && chown -R postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql && su - postgres -c '/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/16/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/16/main/postgresql.conf'\"\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=10\nstdout_logfile=/dev/stdout\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/stderr\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:redis]\ncommand=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf --bind 0.0.0.0 --protected-mode no\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=20\nstdout_logfile=/dev/stdout\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/stderr\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:api]\ncommand=/usr/local/bin/gunicorn --bind 0.0.0.0:8080 api:app\ndirectory=/app\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=30\nstdout_logfile=/dev/stdout\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/stderr\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\n\n[program:nginx]\ncommand=/usr/sbin/nginx -g 'daemon off;'\nautostart=true\nautorestart=true\npriority=40\nstdout_logfile=/dev/stdout\nstdout_logfile_maxbytes=0\nstderr_logfile=/dev/stderr\nstderr_logfile_maxbytes=0\nEOF"

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
